card: reconcile #730 official-equiv into ONE defensible number + P(clears 126.378)
bar_config: int4_g128_lmhead PR#4 (pure-AR; private==public; no haircut on the bar)

authoritative_transfer_rule.rule: int4 same-precision anchor; reject bf16(wrong precision)/advisor(below data)/x1.192(cross-checkpoint).

packet_725_139p9.what_drives_it: advisor back-of-envelope: low verbal local (159, provenance TBD) x transfer 0.880 (BELOW every measured int4 pair). Doubly conservative.
packet_725_139p9.reason: uses an unverified 159 local and a transfer below all int4 data; not the int4-anchored central.

fn_732_147p55.what_drives_it: CURRENT_RESEARCH_STATE.md cycle-58DG: '147.55 (fast /tmp/qat-assistant, provenance-suspect)' via stark-tax 0.870. It is the FAST drafter (not the stock-Hub ship drafter) under a pessimistic transfer.
fn_732_147p55.reason: fast-drafter proxy + sub-measured transfer; provenance-suspect by its own label.

anchored_728_x1p192.what_drives_it: 126.378/106.02 is #728's faithful-engine AR-base ratio on checkpoint /workspace/gemma_build/int4_g128_lmhead, a DIFFERENT model+engine than land's google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct on PR#82. Cross-checkpoint.
anchored_728_x1p192.reason: INVALID: the x1.192 cancels #728's local->official gap for ITS substrate/checkpoint; land's 170.21 already embeds a different local clock. Over-count.

THIS_authoritative.what_drives_it: int4 same-precision transfer 0.986 (band 0.960-1.000) on the TRUE K=6 local; carries #725's 4-9% haircut.
THIS_authoritative.reason: int4-precision-anchored, correct K, correct base model; rejects bf16/advisor/x1.192. This is the defensible decision number.

K_mismatch.impact: use 170.21, not 172.74. ~1.5% lower; also the conservative/correct K.

DRAFTER_mismatch.reality: every optionb measurement used DRAFTER_MODEL=/tmp/qat-assistant (the FAST drafter; CURRENT_RESEARCH_STATE.md labels it 'fast, provenance-suspect' and distinct from the 'shippable stock-Hub drafter'). The submission MANIFEST ships the stock-Hub id, and /tmp/qat-assistant is a LOCAL path unavailable on the HF runner.
DRAFTER_mismatch.impact: 170.21 is an UPPER BOUND on the literal stock-Hub un-rescued K=6 local, which is UNMEASURED on-branch. The fired config (stock-Hub drafter) would likely be slower. GO still robust (see margins) but the point estimate is provenance-thin.

SUBSTRATE_gap.fact: no drafter-off AR arm in the optionb k-sweep (all arms spec K in 3..7); land's 170.21 has NO same-substrate AR base. #728's AR base 106.02 is on a different checkpoint (/workspace/gemma_build/int4_g128_lmhead) + engine.
SUBSTRATE_gap.impact: speedup-ratio form unavailable in-branch; bounded via int4 transfer points. x1.192 anchored form is invalid (cross-checkpoint).

private_repro_gate_SEPARATE_risk.interpretation: clearing the 126.378 BAR is comfortable; the SEPARATE 5% private-repro validity gate (drafter stacks drift most, kanna#44) is the real residual risk -- a stack can beat the bar yet be DQ'd.

verdict.headline: GO (comfortable), but the number is an UPPER BOUND. Authoritative int4-anchored official-equiv for the MEASURED K=6 config (fast /tmp/qat-assistant proxy on the ship base model w4a16-ct) = 167.9 public / ~157.0 private (mid-haircut). P(clears 126.378 after 4-9% haircut) = 1.00 over the int4 band [0.960,1.000]; worst defensible corner = 148.7 TPS (+17.7%, T=0.960 x 9% haircut). The fire fails ONLY if the true land-substrate->official int4 transfer drops below 0.816 -- far under every measured int4 pair and under the advisor's own 0.880 (which still clears at +7.8%). CAVEAT: the #730 submission SHIPS the stock-Hub drafter, never locally speed-measured; 170.21 (fast proxy) bounds it from ABOVE. Even the slower stock projections (147.55) clear post-9%-haircut (+6.2%). Reconciles the scattered 139.9/147.55/x1.192: 139.9 = advisor 0.880 floor, 147.55 = fast-proxy stark-tax, x1.192 = INVALID cross-checkpoint.
